Interface Documentation

All Superinterfaces:
Documentable
public interface Documentation extends Documentable
Describes an object holding documentation.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    static interface 
    Documentation.Builder<B extends Documentation.Builder<B>>
    Describes a builder for creating a Documentation object.

    Description
    static final Documentation
    NONE
    Documentation to use when intentionally representing a Documentable object as having no documentation.

  • Field Details

    • NONE

      static final Documentation NONE
      Documentation to use when intentionally representing a Documentable object as having no documentation.

  • Method Details

    • isNoDocs

      static boolean isNoDocs(Documentation documentation)
      Used for determining whether a documentation
      Parameters:
      documentation - The documentation to check.
      Returns:
      Whether documentation represents an intentionally
      See Also:
      • NONE

    • builder

      @Contract("-> new") static Documentation.Builder<?> builder()
      Returns:
      A builder for creating documentation.

    • of

      @Contract("_, _, _, _ -> new") static Documentation of(String name, String description, String since, String... examples)
      Creates documentation consisting of the four standard properties.
      Parameters:
      name - The name to use.
      description - The description to use.
      since - The since entry to use.
      examples - The examples to use.
      Returns:
      Documentation built from the provided standard properties.

    • of

      @Contract("_ -> new") static Documentation of(Class<?> clazz)
      Creates documentation from the documentation annotations of a class.
      Parameters:
      clazz - The class to read annotations from.
      Returns:
      Documentation created from any documentation annotations present on clazz. If clazz has no documentation annotations, the result of building an empty builder is returned.

    • origin

      Origin origin()
      Returns:
      An origin identifying the provider of the thing represented by this documentation.

    • id

      @Nullable @Nullable String id()
      Returns:
      An identifier for referencing the thing represented by this documentation.

    • autoId

      default String autoId()
      Returns:
      A transformed version of name() that can be used in cases where id() is not explicitly set.

    • name

      String name()
      Returns:
      A name for the thing represented by this documentation.

    • description

      @Unmodifiable String description()
      Returns:
      A description for the thing represented by this documentation.

    • examples

      @Unmodifiable Collection<String> examples()
      Returns:
      Examples for using the thing represented by this documentation.

    • since

      @Unmodifiable SequencedCollection<String> since()
      Returns:
      Versions when the thing represented by this documentation was added or changed.

    • requirements

      @Unmodifiable Collection<String> requirements()
      Returns:
      Requirements for using the thing represented by this documentation.

    • keywords

      @Unmodifiable Collection<String> keywords()
      Returns:
      Keywords for referencing the thing represented by this documentation.

    • deprecated

      boolean deprecated()
      Returns:
      Whether the thing represented by this documentation is considered deprecated.

    • additionalData

      @Unmodifiable Collection<Documentable> additionalData()
      Returns:
      A collection of additional data related to the thing represented by this documentation.
      See Also:
      • additionalData(Class)

    • additionalData

      @Nullable default <T extends Documentable> T additionalData(Class<? extends T> clazz)
      Obtains a specific additional data related to the thing represented by this documentation.
      Type Parameters:
      T - The type of the additional data.
      Parameters:
      clazz - The class of the additional data to obtain.
      Returns:
      Additional data of type T, or null if no such data is present.
      See Also:
      • additionalData()

    • toBuilder

      Documentation.Builder<?> toBuilder()
      Converts this documentation back into a builder.
      Returns:
      A builder capable of building this documentation.

    • write

      default void write(DocumentationAdapter adapter)
      Description copied from interface: Documentable
      Writes information about this object to an adapter.
      Specified by:
      write in interface Documentable
      Parameters:
      adapter - The adapter to write to.
